l_current_max.description: Max motor current - Float Package dynamically adjusts this based on ATR
l_current_max.effect: Higher = more torque/power, higher nosedive risk

l_in_current_max.effect: Limits battery draw - critical for battery health on 2P packs

l_max_erpm.description: Max electrical RPM = top speed limit
l_max_erpm.effect: Hard speed cap - tiltback should trigger before this

l_temp_fet_start.description: FET temperature at which current reduction begins
l_temp_fet_start.note: Float Package adds tiltback 3C before this value

l_temp_fet_end.description: FET temperature at which current is fully cut

readonly_params.note: Te parametry NIE są na whiteliście - nie dotykamy ich automatycznie
